content.text:
正在为主要 URL 与各 app 添加 DRF 视图与路由，并配置前端。

[REDACTED]

input.command:
cd /root/pemanager/backend && python3 << 'PY'
apps = [
    "interfacemanage", "resourcemanage", "routemanage", "qosmanage",
    "firewallmanage", "operationmanage", "logmanage",
]
view_tpl = '''from rest_framework.decorators import api_view
from rest_framework.response import Response

APP_NAME = "{app}"

@api_view(["GET"])
def health(_request):
    return Response({{"app": APP_NAME, "status": "ok"}})
'''
url_tpl = '''from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path("health/", views.health, name="health"),
]
'''
for app in apps:
    with open(f"{app}/views.py", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(view_tpl.format(app=app))
    with open(f"{app}/urls.py", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(url_tpl)
print("done")
PY
input.description: Generate DRF health views and urls for all apps

input.contents:
"""
URL configuration for config project.
"""
from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import include, path

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),
    path('api/interfacemanage/', include('interfacemanage.urls')),
    path('api/resourcemanage/', include('resourcemanage.urls')),
    path('api/routemanage/', include('routemanage.urls')),
    path('api/qosmanage/', include('qosmanage.urls')),
    path('api/firewallmanage/', include('firewallmanage.urls')),
    path('api/operationmanage/', include('operationmanage.urls')),
    path('api/logmanage/', include('logmanage.urls')),
]

import { createApp } from 'vue'
import ElementPlus from 'element-plus'
import 'element-plus/dist/index.css'
import * as ElementPlusIconsVue from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import './style.css'
import App from './App.vue'
import router from './router'

const app = createApp(App)
for (const [key, component] of Object.entries(ElementPlusIconsVue)) {
  app.component(key, component)
}
app.use(ElementPlus)
app.use(router)
app.mount('#app')

import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'

const modules = [
  { path: '/', name: 'home', title: '首页', component: () => import('../views/HomeView.vue') },
  { path: '/interfacemanage', name: 'interfacemanage', title: '接口管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/interfacemanage/' } },
  { path: '/resourcemanage', name: 'resourcemanage', title: '资源管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/resourcemanage/' } },
  { path: '/routemanage', name: 'routemanage', title: '路由管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/routemanage/' } },
  { path: '/qosmanage', name: 'qosmanage', title: 'QoS 管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/qosmanage/' } },
  { path: '/firewallmanage', name: 'firewallmanage', title: '防火墙管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/firewallmanage/' } },
  { path: '/operationmanage', name: 'operationmanage', title: '运维管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/operationmanage/' } },
  { path: '/logmanage', name: 'logmanage', title: '日志管理', component: () => import('../views/ModulePlaceholder.vue'), meta: { apiPrefix: '/api/logmanage/' } },
]

const routes = modules.map((m) => ({
  path: m.path,
  name: m.name,
  component: m.component,
  meta: { title: m.title, ...(m.meta || {}) },
}))

export default createRouter({
  history: createWebHistory(),
  routes,
})

<script setup>
import { RouterLink } from 'vue-router'

const items = [
  { to: '/interfacemanage', label: '接口管理' },
  { to: '/resourcemanage', label: '资源管理' },
  { to: '/routemanage', label: '路由管理' },
  { to: '/qosmanage', label: 'QoS 管理' },
  { to: '/firewallmanage', label: '防火墙管理' },
  { to: '/operationmanage', label: '运维管理' },
  { to: '/logmanage', label: '日志管理' },
]
</script>

<template>
  <el-space direction="vertical" :size="16" style="width: 100%">
    <el-text size="large">PE Manager — 选择业务模块</el-text>
    <el-space wrap>
      <el-button
        v-for="item in items"
        :key="item.to"
        tag="RouterLink"
        :to="item.to"
        type="primary"
        plain
      >
        {{ item.label }}
      </el-button>
    </el-space>
  </el-space>
</template>

<script setup>
const items = [
  { to: '/interfacemanage', label: '接口管理' },
  { to: '/resourcemanage', label: '资源管理' },
  { to: '/routemanage', label: '路由管理' },
  { to: '/qosmanage', label: 'QoS 管理' },
  { to: '/firewallmanage', label: '防火墙管理' },
  { to: '/operationmanage', label: '运维管理' },
  { to: '/logmanage', label: '日志管理' },
]
</script>

<template>
  <el-space direction="vertical" :size="16" style="width: 100%">
    <el-text size="large">PE Manager — 选择业务模块</el-text>
    <el-space wrap>
      <router-link
        v-for="item in items"
        :key="item.to"
        :to="item.to"
        custom
        v-slot="{ href, navigate }"
      >
        <el-button type="primary" plain tag="a" :href="href" @click="navigate">
          {{ item.label }}
        </el-button>
      </router-link>
    </el-space>
  </el-space>
</template>

content.text:
## 已完成内容

### 1. Python 虚拟环境
- 路径：`/root/pemanager/venv`  
- 环境中已安装：**Django 5.x**、**djangorestframework**、**django-cors-headers**  
- 因系统缺少 `ensurepip`，已在环境中安装 `python3.12-venv`，之后 `python3 -m venv` 可正常使用  

### 2. 后端（Django + DRF）
- 目录：`/root/pemanager/backend`  
- 工程包名：`config`  
- 已接入：`rest_framework`、`corsheaders`，`CORS` 放行 Vite 开发地址 `http://localhost:5173` / `127.0.0.1:5173`  
- 依赖文件：`/root/pemanager/requirements.txt`（与 `backend/requirements.txt` 一致）  

### 3. 前端（Vue 3 + Element Plus）
- 目录：`/root/pemanager/frontend`  
- **Vite 固定为 5.x**（当前机器 Node 为 20.18.2，Vite 8 的 rolldown 在本环境会报错，降级后可正常 `npm run build`）  
- 已配置：`element-plus`、图标、`vue-router`、`axios`、`pinia`  
- `vite.config.js` 中 `/api` 代理到 `http://127.0.0.1:8000`  

### 4. Django 应用
您写的是「6 个 app」，但列了 **7 个**名称，已按名称全部创建并注册：

| 应用 | API 前缀（示例） |
|------|------------------|
| interfacemanage | `/api/interfacemanage/health/` |
| resourcemanage | `/api/resourcemanage/health/` |
| routemanage | `/api/routemanage/health/` |
| qosmanage | `/api/qosmanage/health/` |
| firewallmanage | `/api/firewallmanage/health/` |
| operationmanage | `/api/operationmanage/health/` |
| logmanage | `/api/logmanage/health/` |

每个 app 内有 DRF `GET .../health/` 占位接口，前端模块页会请求对应 `health` 并展示返回 JSON。

---

## 本地运行方式

**后端：**
```bash
source /root/pemanager/venv/bin/activate
cd /root/pemanager/backend
python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
```

**前端：**
```bash
cd /root/pemanager/frontend
npm run dev
```

浏览器打开 Vite 提示的地址（一般为 `http://localhost:5173`），侧边栏可进入各业务模块并看到与后端的联调结果。

若您本意只要 **6 个** app，请说明要删掉哪一个名称，我可以按你的清单改 `INSTALLED_APPS`、路由和前端菜单。

[REDACTED]
